highlights.text: If government reopens, it could be a “gap and go” scenario to those upside targets instantly without any retrace or pause… My lean as long as those hold we work higher to 6806, 6815, then 6851.” Gap and go it was and we hit 6851 yesterday afternoon.
I wrote at 4pm yesterday: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
These siblings are elevator down , and short squeeze.
Case in point: Friday morning ES went elevator down selling 115 points.
When you see an elevator down move like this, we know an equivalently (at minimum) powerful short squeeze is loading.
The same thing: A Failed Breakdown (my core setup) where price flushes a major low, traps shorts, and recovers.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “It is much smarter to wait for the Failed Breakdown of the October 22nd 6690 low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into three Failed Breakdowns on Thursday and Friday.

post_title: After Friday's Bottoming Trigger, Today Was Day 3 of Squeeze For SPX. How Many More Are Left? November 12 Plan
